quick_skim.title: Constrained Tensor Decomposition-Based Target Sensing for Sparse Non-Uniform Array-Enabled AFDM ISAC Systems
quick_skim.abstract: Sparse non-uniform array-enabled affine frequency division multiplexing (AFDM) is a promising candidate for integrated sensing and communication (ISAC), while its performance critically depends on accurate target parameter estimation. In this paper, we propose a constrained tensor decomposition-based sensing framework for delay, Doppler, and angle estimation. Specifically, a manifold-constrained alternating least squares (ALS) algorithm is developed by exploiting the sparse array geometry structure, enabling robust factor matrix extraction and direct angle estimation. From the decomposed factor matrices, we further apply an iterative one dimensional golden section search to refine delay and Doppler shift. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm nearly attains Cramér-Rao bound (CRB) and significantly outperforms unconstrained ALS and conventional methods, validating its effectiveness for sparse non-uniform array-enabled AFDM ISAC systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses constrained tensor decomposition for target parameter estimation with high-frequency AFDM signals, relevant to underwater high-frequency target recognition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用约束张量分解处理高频AFDM信号进行目标参数估计，与水下高频目标识别相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用约束张量分解处理高频AFDM信号进行目标参数估计，与水下高频目标识别相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用约束张量分解处理高频AFDM信号进行目标参数估计，与水下高频目标识别相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a constrained tensor decomposition framework for delay, Doppler, and angle estimation in AFDM ISAC systems, using manifold-constrained ALS and golden section search, achieving high accuracy for high-frequency sensing.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对稀疏非均匀阵列AFDM ISAC系统中目标参数估计问题，本文提出一种基于约束张量分解的感知框架。通过利用阵列几何结构，开发了流形约束交替最小二乘算法实现鲁棒因子矩阵提取和直接角度估计，并采用一维黄金分割搜索细化时延和多普勒。仿真验证了该方法在高频感知场景下的有效性，为水下高频目标识别提供了可迁移的信号处理方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对稀疏非均匀阵列AFDM ISAC系统中目标参数估计问题，本文提出一种基于约束张量分解的感知框架。通过利用阵列几何结构，开发了流形约束交替最小二乘算法实现鲁棒因子矩阵提取和直接角度估计，并采用一维黄金分割搜索细化时延和多普勒。仿真验证了该方法在高频感知场景下的有效性，为水下高频目标识别提供了可迁移的信号处理方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: underwater acoustic signal processing for high frequency target recognition
